description: You are logged into wger fitness manager at http://localhost as the admin user (username: admin, password: adminadmin). Create a Training Routine named 'Hotel Gym Full Body' with a Training Day named 'Full Body Circuit'. The day must include 5 distinct exercises that require either 'Dumbbell' or 'Cable' equipment, with at least one of each type represented. Each exercise must be configured for 3 sets of 12 repetitions.
